UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile details containing country and educational preferences

uid.description: The unique firebase Auth UID of the user

country.description: The user's chosen country of residence

interests.description: Comma-separated or JSON list of academic/extracurricular interests

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the profile was last modified

users/{userId}.description: A collection containing student user profiles with their selected country and grade
